prestazioni: S54B32 engine (3.2L I6) bored to 3.4L with forged internals: Mahle Motorsport pistons (9.5:1 CR), Pauter billet crankshaft, Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and ARP L19 head studs for 800+ hp reliability under forced induction

Custom turbo system: Garrett GTX4202R Gen II turbo (82mm compressor, .96 A/R turbine housing) with TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate, custom 3.5" stainless steel equal-length tubular manifold (TIG-welded by Burns Stainless), and Vibrant 1450 intercooler with 4.5" core and 3" inlet/outlet

Fuel and ignition: Full sequential Bosch Motorsport 0261S02017 8x8 standalone ECU with Motec C125 dash logger, ID1000x injectors (staged with ID2000s for E85), Walbro 450LPH dual-pump setup, and MSD 8516 CDI ignition with NGK R7437-9 racing plugs gapped at 0.020"
estetica: Custom widebody conversion: Rocket Bunny V3 M Coupe kit (carbon fiber fenders with 50mm flares, front/rear bumpers, and duckbill spoiler) paired with custom 3M Gloss Black Cherry vinyl wrap with hand-painted clown shoe motifs (inspired by 1990s JDM Bosozoku aesthetics)

Suspension and stance: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for M Coupe chassis), Eibach ERS 1000N/mm helper springs, and custom 5x120 to 5x114.3 hub conversion with Work Meister S1 3P 18x10.5 +25 and 18x12 +40 wheels (stretched 275/35 and 315/30 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires)

Interior and aero: Recaro Pole Position II seats with custom Schroth 6-point harnesses, MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede), and custom carbon fiber rear diffuser with integrated titanium exhaust outlets (custom 3.5" dual side-exit system by Agency Power with Inconel 625 headers)
